ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hvac_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HVAC unit */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone where the unit is installed */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the HVAC unit (e.g., air handler, chiller) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the HVAC unit */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the unit was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last date when the unit was maintained */,
  "warranty_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the unit's warranty expires */,
  "operational_hours" INTEGER /* Total operational hours of the unit */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the unit */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number provided by the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hvac_units_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone (e.g., Conference Room A) */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the zone is located */,
  "floor_number" INTEGER /* Floor number of the zone */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the zone in square meters */,
  "occupancy_type" TEXT /* Type of occupancy (e.g., office, conference, storage) */,
  "temperature_setpoint" REAL /* Desired temperature setpoint for the zone */,
  "humidity_setpoint" REAL /* Desired humidity setpoint for the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zones_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the building */,
  "total_floors" INTEGER /* Total number of floors in the building */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Last date when the building was inspected */,
  "energy_certification" TEXT /* Energy efficiency certifications the building has */,
  "annual_energy_consumption" REAL /* Annual energy consumption of the building in kWh */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data record */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HVAC unit generating the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data record */,
  "heat_mass_flow" REAL /* Heat mass flow of the unit in kg/s */,
  "heat_capacity" REAL /* Heat capacity of the unit in W */,
  "cool_mass_flow" REAL /* Cooling mass flow of the unit in kg/s */,
  "sens_cool_capacity" REAL /* Sensible cooling capacity of the unit in W */,
  "tot_cool_capacity" REAL /* Total cooling capacity of the unit in W */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption of the unit in kW */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the unit in °C */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity of the unit in % */,
  "fan_speed" REAL /* Fan speed of the unit in RPM */,
  "compressor_pressure" REAL /* Compressor pressure of the unit in bar */,
  "energy_efficiency_ratio" REAL /* Energy efficiency ratio (EER) of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES hvac_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HVAC unit that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., performance anomaly, maintenance needed) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "acknowledged_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who acknowledged the alert */,
  "acknowledged_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was acknowledged */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_acknowledged_by FOREIGN KEY ("acknowledged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES hvac_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., facility manager, energy analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
